label: run-wave: citadel-pantheon-integration
prompt: Execute the current wave of milestone 'citadel-pantheon-integration' in parallel. Run `sdlc project prepare --milestone citadel-pantheon-integration --json` to get the live wave plan. Wave 1 of the output is the current wave. For each feature in Wave 1 that does not need a worktree, spawn a parallel Agent call running `/sdlc-run <feature-slug>`. Wait for all agents to complete, then re-run prepare and report the updated wave plan.
